title: Curried Chicken Sandwich
summary: Here's another easy recipe you can make with your batch-cooked Slow-Roasted Curried Coconut Chicken. It's really simple to make and is absolutely delicious.

method.description: Make the Slow-Roasted Curried Coconut Chicken batch recipe.
Squeeze the garlic bulb into a bowl and mix the mayo through.
Halve the marinated tomatoes and roughly chop half the cooked onions. Add both to a bowl, zest over ¼ of the lime and squeeze over the juice. Toss together then taste and season with salt, if needed.
Shred one chicken breast and the wings, discarding any bones. Toss through the onion mixture.
Slice the focaccia pieces in half and then toast them. Spread the mayo onto the cut sides, top with baby gem leaves, chicken salad and crispy shallots. Sandwich together.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
